subcodes.first_line: This is the Book wherein the Dove warbleth melodies of the Beloved's glory and reciteth unto all created things the verses of separation, and this is decreed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب فیه تنطق الورقا بنغمات عز محبوب و  یتلوا  علی الممکنات آیات الفراق و هذا تقدیر
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
